name: Anglo American plc
description: Anglo American plc is a leading global mining company with a portfolio of world-class competitive operations and development projects. The company produces copper, platinum group metals, premium quality iron ore, and metallurgical coal, as well as diamonds through its De Beers subsidiary. Anglo American is committed to securing, developing, and operating high-quality assets safely and sustainably, playing an essential role in meeting the dual demands of global decarbonization and consumer-driven growth.
